title: Global Logistics Optimization
content:
Executive Summary

Atlas Freight Corp needed a complete overhaul of their legacy tracking system. By implementing a custom AI-driven logistics platform, we reduced manual data entry by 90% and improved delivery time predictions by 40%.

The Challenge

  • Legacy on-premise servers causing 4h+ downtimes weekly.
  • Manual Excel-based route planning.
  • No real-time visibility for customers.

The Solution

We deployed a cloud-native architecture using:

  • AWS Lambda for serverless scaling.
  • Next.js for the customer portal.
  • Python/TensorFlow for route optimization models.

Results

"eCyPro transformed our operations in 3 months. The ROI was immediate." - CTO, Atlas Freight
